scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for ユメステ

consistency_checks.notes: ユメステ consistency checks follow the Bandori anchor: enforce structural scope, lane-pattern geometry, and Phase 4 gating rather than gameplay semantics or DB parity.
